description: You are a community health worker investigating toxic chemical releases using the EPA's Toxic Release Inventory (TRI) tools (https://www.epa.gov/toxics-release-inventory-tri-program). Research Harris County, Texas and St. James Parish, Louisiana to identify the top released chemicals and reporting facilities. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Community Health Research' containing at least 4 relevant EPA pages and download an official TRI data file (CSV, Excel, or PDF). Write a summary report to ~/Documents/tri_community_report.txt including sections for each location with at least two specific toxic chemicals, one named facility, and quantitative data (facility counts or release amounts) for each area based on actual values found on the EPA website.
